title: Luffy Laughs Against Kaido
description: On pages 4–6, this part focuses on Unknown person #4, Yamato, Unknown person #5, Orochi, Unknown person #6, Kaido as Luffy awakens Gear Fifth and fights Kaido as Onigashima’s fall, Wano’s fire festival, and twenty years of suffering converge.
scene: Luffy awakens Gear Fifth and fights Kaido as Onigashima’s fall, Wano’s fire festival, and twenty years of suffering converge.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: ...The most ridiculous power in the world...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Treasure Repository, 2nd Floor

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: H-Hiyor!!!

dialogue.speaker: Yamato
dialogue.text: I-I really admired Oden....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: think about what you're doing....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It was all Kaido, he was using me!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We can still run away together!! Just remove these nails and...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You spat in the face of a Samuel you owed.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Who would still believe you?

dialogue.speaker: Yamato
dialogue.text: my father kept his promise.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Did he not?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He danced like a fool for five long years because he thought...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...You and Kado would honor the secret arrangement you made and free wano!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: He never even told his own family!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My father was a man who kept his word!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He still expected the same of you when you agreed to let them go...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...If he withstood being boiled for an entire hour!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: even while his body was being burned by the oil...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Despite it all, he always smiled, always!

dialogue.speaker: Yamato
dialogue.text: I can't even fathom my father's suffering...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He had to shoulder the burden by himself...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: ...Because the entire nation was your hostage!!

dialogue.speaker: Orochi
dialogue.text: What's the matter, Hiyori?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: father, are you really okay with what everyone says about you?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Of course I am!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: You know why?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Because...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I have you guys!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Really?! Then I swear I'll always be here for you!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: OH YES!! I've always said open was a great samural!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As shown, I can ensure his legacy is recognized... your father--

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Hold your tongue, you miserable wretch!!

dialogue.speaker: Orochi
dialogue.text: I am Kozuki Hiyori!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 33 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
